primary_goal.evidence: Dominant_language: hi Duration_seconds: 72.0 Total_turns: 11 TRANSCRIPT: <<< Agent: Hello. Customer: Oh yes sir, good afternoon. Soumya this side from Tata AIA A group sir. Agent: Haan boliye. Customer: Yes sir actually maine aapke paas call connect kiya regarding to give information about Tata Param Rakshakaran Flow Plus plan. Is plan mein sir aapko survival time pe bhi sir returns provide kiye jaate hain. Plus is same plan mein sir in for your future crisis and sir for your future plan for your child education etc things ke liye bhi sir ye plan aapko financially support karta hai, okay? Agent: Nahi mera already mere paas ek term insurance hai na aapke paas. Customer: Yes sir, woh toh sir term insurance hai na sir. Sir term insurance toh sir nominee ko sir paisa de diya jaata hai policy holder ke mishapening hone ke baad. But sir usse pehle sir future mein sir agar kuch mere pe dukh aate hain, sir koi crisis aata hai, toh sir ye plan sir aapko survival time mein bhi sir 5 se leke sir 10 lakh rupees tak provide karta hai. Taaki sir jo bhi aapke pe musibat aayi hai sir usko aap sambhal sako. Agent: Okay. Customer: Ye kya hai madam, mujhe only three years left hai for retirement. Agent: Okay okay, theek hai. Customer: Haan toh abhi ye 57 ke age mein ye plan [unclear] nahi hai. Agent: Yes yes sir, theek hai. >>>

agent_promises: 5 se leke 10 lakh rupees tak provide karta hai

product_fit.mismatch_reason: Customer is 57 and retiring in 3 years; the pitched product is not suitable for his life stage.

approachability.reasoning: Customer is nearing retirement and explicitly stated the product is not suitable for his current life stage.

call_narrative.opening_hook: Agent introduced the Tata Param Rakshakaran Flow Plus plan, and the customer immediately countered with existing term insurance.
call_narrative.customer_response: Customer was polite but firm in pushing back due to his nearing retirement.
call_narrative.key_event: Customer raised an objection about being only three years away from retirement.
call_narrative.ending: The customer politely dismissed the pitch, and the agent acknowledged the feedback.

key_quotes: Nahi mera already mere paas ek term insurance hai na aapke paas.
Ye kya hai madam, mujhe only three years left hai for retirement.
